case_title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. VS. JOSHUA DODSON

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT DODSON, JOSHUA
